introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Inclusive Financial Solutions Company is committed to protecting your personal information and ensuring the privacy of your data in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, including the Personal Data Protection System in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. This policy clarifies the types of data we collect, the reasons for collecting it, how it is used, and your rights as a data subject.

scope.title: 1. Scope
scope.content: This Personal Data Protection Policy applies to all users of Inclusive Financial Solutions Company's services and platforms, including individuals who access the website, mobile applications, or use its services.

items.title: Principle One - Accountability
items.description: The privacy policy of the controlling entity must be defined and documented, approved by the entity's chief executive (or their delegate), and published to all parties involved in its implementation.

items.title: Principle Two - Transparency
items.description: A notice regarding the privacy policy and procedures of the controlling entity must be prepared, clearly and explicitly stating the specific purposes for which personal data is processed.

items.title: Principle Three - Choice and Consent
items.description: All possible options for the personal data subject must be identified, and consent (express or implicit) obtained regarding the collection, use, or disclosure of their data.

items.title: Principle Four - Data Collection Limitation
items.description: The collection of personal data should be limited to the minimum necessary to achieve the purposes specified in the privacy notice.

items.title: Principle Five - Limitation of Data Use, Retention, and Disposal
items.description: The processing of personal data must be restricted to the purposes specified in the privacy notice for which the data subject gave their implicit or explicit consent, and it must be retained only as long as necessary to achieve the specified purposes or as required by applicable laws, regulations, and policies in the Kingdom, and disposed of in a secure manner that prevents leakage, loss, embezzlement, misuse, or unauthorized access.

items.title: Principle Six - Data Access
items.description: Means must be identified and provided for data subjects to access their personal data for review, updating, and correction.

items.title: Principle Seven - Limitation of Data Disclosure
items.description: Data disclosure must be limited to parties specified in the privacy notice for which the data subject gave consent.

items.title: Principle Eight - Data Security
items.description: Personal data must be protected from leakage, damage, loss, embezzlement, misuse, modification, or unauthorized access, in accordance with National Cybersecurity Authority guidelines.

items.title: Principle Nine - Data Quality
items.description: Personal data must be kept accurate, complete, and directly relevant to the specified purposes.

items.title: Principle Ten - Monitoring and Compliance
items.description: Compliance with privacy policies and procedures must be monitored, and inquiries, complaints, and privacy-related disputes must be handled.

dataCollection.title: 3. Data We Collect
dataCollection.intro: We collect and process various types of personal data to provide and improve our services:

sections.title: Personal Information
items: Account data: Establishment name, establishment type, activity type, sector type, commercial name, national address.
Identity verification data: Copy of national ID, passport, or any other documents necessary for regulatory compliance (commercial registration, license, etc.).
Bank account data: Name in bank, bank name, account number, bank certificate, owner data.

sections.title: Contact Data:
items: Information provided during your communication with customer support via chats, phone calls, or email.

sections.title: Technical Data:
items: Cookies and similar technologies to improve website functionality and analyze performance.

processing.title: 4. Processing Your Data
processing.intro: The purpose of its processing is only after the explicit consent of its owner in accordance with Article (5) of the Personal Data Protection System for specific purposes, which include:

items.title: Service Providers:
items.description: External companies that help provide our services, such as payment processors and cloud storage providers.

items.title: Regulatory Bodies:
items.description: To comply with legal obligations or based on official requests.

items.title: Business Partners:
items.description: When needed to complete financial transactions or provide related services.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing Your Data
sharing.intro: The client undertakes and declares, being of full legal capacity, the following:
items: That they are not legally prohibited from dealing with the company, and that all data provided by them is correct, reliable, and updated.

That they are responsible before the competent authorities for funds deposited in their account with their knowledge, and those deposited in their account without their knowledge, whether they personally disposed of them or not, if they do not officially report them upon knowing of their presence in their account.

That the funds deposited in the account are derived from legitimate activities and that they are responsible for their validity. If <bold>Inclusive Financial Solutions Company</bold> receives any illicit or counterfeit funds from them, it is not entitled to recover them or be compensated for them.

That <bold>Inclusive Financial Solutions Company</bold> has the right to freeze the account or any of the amounts credited to it and notify the competent authorities if there is suspicion that the amounts result from financial fraud or illegal operations in accordance with applicable regulations and instructions.
That they are the true beneficiary of the account.

That they are fully aware and knowledgeable that it is prohibited to transfer to unknown persons or entities according to applicable regulations and instructions, and that all transfers they make are to known persons and entities and for known and legitimate commercial purposes.

That they have read and understood the terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement, and that they will read the terms and conditions specific to the services and products associated with the account, as published on the company's website.

protecting.title: 6. Protecting Your Data
protecting.intro: We implement strong security measures to protect your data, including:
items: Restricting data access based on need.
Conducting regular security reviews and updates.
protecting.footer: In the event of a data breach, affected users will be immediately notified in line with applicable regulations.

retention.title: 7. Data Retention
retention.content: The company retains your personal data only as long as necessary to achieve the purposes outlined in this policy or to comply with legal and regulatory obligations.

rights.title: 8. Your Rights
rights.intro: Under the Personal Data Protection System, you have the following rights:

items.title: Access:
items.description: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

items.title: Correction:
items.description: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.

items.title: Deletion:
items.description: Request deletion of your data, unless there are legal obligations preventing this.

items.title: Withdraw Consent:
items.description: Revoke your consent to the processing of your data (where possible).

footer.text: To exercise your rights, please contact us via email at

transfer.title: 9. International Data Transfer
transfer.content: The company primarily stores data within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and it is not transferred or processed outside the Kingdom.

updates.title: 10. Policy Updates
updates.text: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices or compliance requirements. The updated version will be available on our website, and you will be contacted regarding important updates.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any inquiries regarding this privacy policy or your data:

details.label: Address:
details.value: Sultan Business Center, Al Ma'athar Al Shamali, Riyadh, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

contact.footer: We value your trust and are committed to protecting your privacy at all times.
